title: Multiplexed In Vivo Imaging with Fluorescence Lifetime-Modulating Tags.
author: El Hajji L Lam F Avtodeeva M Benaissa H Rampon C Volovitch M Vriz S Gautier A
content: S-EPMC11347991 PMC11347991 Multiplexed In Vivo Imaging with Fluorescence Lifetime-Modulating Tags.
